flashcards.front: What is the basic structure of a Turing machine?
What is the purpose of the transition rules in a Turing machine?
flashcards.back: To specify the next state and symbol to be written on the tape

flashcards.front: What is the difference between a deterministic and non-deterministic Turing machine?
flashcards.back: A deterministic Turing machine cannot make non-deterministic choices, while a non-deterministic Turing machine can

flashcards.front: What is the purpose of a universal Turing machine?
flashcards.back: To simulate the behavior of any other Turing machine

flashcards.front: What is the advantage of using a multi-tape Turing machine?
flashcards.back: It has more computational power than a single-tape Turing machine
